route: #/crm (kanban card click -> handleCardClick -> openLeadDetail; desktop opens cardDetailModal, mobile <=768px opens openMobileJobDetail)
expected_behavior: Generic closeModal delegate removes .open from #cardDetailModal (closeCardDetailModal path); no data write. Two close affordances exist (corner ✕ + bar ✕), both target cardDetailModal.
notes: Backdrop click also closes via data-action='modalBackdropClose' data-target='closeCardDetailModal' on the .modal-bg root (dashboard.html:12582).

label: ✕ (header bar Close)
expected_behavior: Same closeModal delegate as the corner ✕ — removes .open from #cardDetailModal. Duplicate close in the standardized .m-modal-bar header.
notes: aria-label='Close'.

label: <jobType chip> (e.g. 'Insurance' / 'Set type')
expected_behavior: cdPickType(el) (dashboard-actions.js:92) anchors below the chip and opens KanbanContextMenu.openTypePicker(_cardDetailLeadId, anchor) — the same classification picker used by kanban right-click. Re-tints chip via refreshCardDetailChips after change. No-op if KanbanContextMenu not loaded or no _cardDetailLeadId.
notes: role='button' tabindex='0' cursor:pointer; label text + tint set in openCardDetailModal from JOB_TYPE_META/inferJobType (dashboard-widgets.js:892).

label: <stage chip> (e.g. 'Claim Filed')
expected_behavior: cdPickStage(el) (dashboard-actions.js:85) anchors below the chip and opens KanbanContextMenu.openStagePicker(_cardDetailLeadId, anchor) — moves the card to another kanban stage via moveCard (which enforces the required-field gate). Stage chip re-tints via refreshCardDetailChips. No-op if KanbanContextMenu not loaded.
notes: Stage move runs through moveCard's required-field gate (see kanban-move-gate memory). Label/color set from stageLabel()/stageColor() (dashboard-widgets.js:873).

label: ✓ Promote to Customer
expected_behavior: cdaConfirmPromote -> confirmPromoteProspect(_cardDetailLeadId) (dashboard-actions.js:1376): shows _prospectConfirm dialog 'Promote <name> to a full customer?'; on OK calls promoteProspect(leadId) (flips isProspect, adds to kanban, removes from Prospects) then closeCardDetailModal().
notes: Banner shown/hidden by openCardDetailModal based on lead.isProspect (dashboard-widgets.js:915). Promote is a state-changing write that surfaces the lead into the live pipeline — treated as publish-class.

label: 📞 Call
expected_behavior: Dynamically built by populateProspectQuickActions (dashboard-widgets.js:1210). Sets window.location.href='tel:'+digits. Disabled (not-allowed, .45 opacity) when lead.phone empty.
notes: Built with createElement; no stable id — selector is positional within #prospectQuickActions.

label: 💬 Text
expected_behavior: populateProspectQuickActions: window.location.href='sms:'+digits. Disabled when no phone.
notes: send-class (opens SMS composer pre-addressed). Hands off to OS messaging app; no in-app send.

label: ✉️ Email
expected_behavior: populateProspectQuickActions: window.location.href='mailto:'+email. Disabled when lead.email empty.
notes: send-class (opens mail composer); no in-app send.

label: 🚪 Re-knock
expected_behavior: populateProspectQuickActions: closeCardDetailModal() then D2D.openQuickKnock({address,lat,lng}) (or goTo('d2d') if D2D not loaded).
notes: Always enabled.

label: 🗺️ See on Map
expected_behavior: populateProspectQuickActions: closeCardDetailModal() then viewProspectOnMap(lead.id) (dashboard-actions.js:1418) -> goTo('d2d') + map flyTo(lat,lng). Disabled when lead has no lat/lng.
notes: Disabled when !hasGeo.

label: 🗄️ Hide / 👁️ Unhide
expected_behavior: populateProspectQuickActions: toggleProspectHidden(lead.id) (dashboard-actions.js:1398) — soft-hide, writes prospectHidden:!prev + updatedAt, toasts, closeCardDetailModal(), refreshes Prospects. Label/icon flips on lead.prospectHidden.
notes: Reversible soft-hide (record kept); not a delete.

label: 🗑️ Delete
expected_behavior: populateProspectQuickActions (danger styling): absoluteDeleteProspect(lead.id) (dashboard-actions.js:1439). Hard-refuses if lead.isProspect!==true ('use Trash instead'). Otherwise a 3-gate destructive flow (see rows 013-015) ending in permanent deleteDoc(leads/<id>) — NO trash recovery.
notes: Permanent erase, prospects only. Guard at dashboard-actions.js:1447 blocks customers.

selector: _prospectConfirm dialog #1 OK (okLabel='Continue', danger:true) — built by D2D.uiConfirm/uiConfirm
label: Continue
expected_behavior: First gate of absoluteDeleteProspect (dashboard-actions.js:1459). Message 'Permanently delete <name>?'. OK ('Continue') proceeds to gate #2; Cancel aborts. Resolves the _prospectConfirm promise true/false.
notes: No static markup in dashboard.html — dialog DOM is built dynamically by D2D.uiConfirm (or window.uiConfirm), native confirm() fallback. Paired Cancel button also present (cancelLabel='Cancel').

label: I'm sure
expected_behavior: Second gate of absoluteDeleteProspect (dashboard-actions.js:1466). Message 'Are you ABSOLUTELY sure?'. OK proceeds to the typed gate; Cancel aborts.
notes: Paired Cancel ('Cancel') aborts and leaves lead as a hidden prospect.

selector: _prospectPrompt dialog typed-confirmation input + submit (D2D.uiPrompt/uiPrompt, prompt() fallback)
label: Type DELETE in all caps
expected_behavior: Third/final gate of absoluteDeleteProspect (dashboard-actions.js:1473). Typed value must STRICTLY === 'DELETE'; anything else toasts 'Delete cancelled' and aborts. On 'DELETE' submit: deleteDoc(leads/<id>), remove from window._leads, toast, closeCardDetailModal(), refresh Prospects + renderLeads, dispatch 'leadsChanged'.
notes: Typed-confirmation gate. Case-sensitive exact match 'DELETE'. Permanent erase — no recovery.

label: 📸 Photos
expected_behavior: openPhotosForLead (dashboard-actions.js:1529): _stashLeadForCustomerPage(id) then navigates window.location.href='/pro/customer.html?id=<id>#photos'. Leaves dashboard. No-op if no _cardDetailLeadId.
notes: Full-page navigation to customer.html photos tab.

label: 📄 Documents
expected_behavior: openDocsForLead (dashboard-actions.js:1536): _stashLeadForCustomerPage(id) then navigates to '/pro/customer.html?id=<id>#documents'. No-op if no _cardDetailLeadId.
notes: Full-page navigation to customer.html documents tab.

label: ✓ Tasks
expected_behavior: cdaOpenTaskModal (dashboard-actions.js:248): openTaskModal(_cardDetailLeadId, null) — opens #taskModal for this lead (rows 027-033). No-op if no _cardDetailLeadId.
notes: Opens #taskModal stacked above the card-detail modal (taskModal z-index 2500).

label: 📷 Camera
expected_behavior: cdaPhotos (dashboard-actions.js:57): closeCardDetailModal() then PhotoEngine.openCamera(_cardDetailLeadId). Toasts 'Photo engine loading...' if PhotoEngine not ready (lazy `photos` bundle).
notes: Distinct from Photos (016): Camera opens the in-app capture flow, not the customer.html gallery.

label: 💰 Invoice
expected_behavior: cdaInvoice (dashboard-actions.js:65): closeCardDetailModal() then InvoicePipeline.createInvoiceUI(_cardDetailLeadId). Toasts 'Invoice pipeline loading...' if not ready.
notes: Opens invoice builder UI; creation/send happens inside that flow (out of this gap's scope).

label: 📋 Report
expected_behavior: cdaInspectionDeep (dashboard-actions.js:100): closeCardDetailModal(), then after 200ms shows #inspectionBuilderOverlay and InspectionReportEngine.openBuilder(leadId). Toasts 'Inspection engine loading...' if engine (lazy `photos` bundle) not ready.
notes: 200ms timeout lets the modal-close animation finish before showing the overlay.

label: 🔗 Share Homeowner Portal
expected_behavior: cdaSharePortalLink (dashboard-actions.js:233) -> _sharePortalLink(_cardDetailLeadId) (dashboard-api.js:431): calls createPortalToken callable (ttlDays:30), builds portal.html?token=, copies to clipboard + toasts, and offers an SMS shortcut prefilled with the link when a phone is on file.
notes: send-class: mints a live homeowner-portal access token and can open SMS to the homeowner. Token grants external portal access.

label: 🎙 Voice Memo
expected_behavior: cdaVoiceMemo (dashboard-actions.js:166): NBDVoiceMemo.recordForLead(_cardDetailLeadId) — records a voice memo, auto-transcribed + attached to this lead. No-op if NBDVoiceMemo not loaded or no lead id.

label: 📩 Voicemail
expected_behavior: cdaOpenVoicemail (dashboard-actions.js:174): NBDVoicemail.openForLead(_cardDetailLeadId) — opens the voicemail pipeline (record OR upload, AI summary + auto-tasks from action items). No-op if NBDVoicemail not loaded.
notes: Distinct from Voice Memo (023): this is the summarize+upload+auto-task layer.

label: 🚫 (Revoke portal links)
expected_behavior: cdaRevokePortalLink (dashboard-actions.js:238) -> _revokePortalLink(_cardDetailLeadId) (dashboard-api.js:410): native window.confirm 'Revoke all active portal links...?'; on OK calls revokePortalToken callable then immediately _sharePortalLink to mint a fresh link. The old portal URL stops working instantly.
notes: Confirm is a single native confirm() (no separate markup row). delete-class because it invalidates existing access tokens — destructive to outstanding homeowner links.

label: View Full Customer Details
expected_behavior: openFullCustomerDetails (dashboard-actions.js:1543): _stashLeadForCustomerPage(id) then navigates window.location.href='/pro/customer.html?id=<id>' (no hash tab). Leaves dashboard. No-op if no _cardDetailLeadId.
notes: Primary full-width CTA.

label: ✎ Edit Details
expected_behavior: editCardDetails (dashboard-actions.js:1550): closeCardDetailModal() then editLead(_cardDetailLeadId) — opens the lead edit modal (the full add/edit-lead form whose Save goes through saveLead). No-op if no _cardDetailLeadId.
notes: Edit form/Save out of this gap's scope (separate lead-modal). See C-1 saveLead allowlist note in live-qa memory.

expected_behavior: Generic closeModal delegate removes .open from #taskModal. closeTaskModal() (tasks.js:167) also nulls _taskModalLeadId and re-renders kanban + today's tasks. Two ✕ affordances (corner + bar), both target taskModal.
notes: There is NO separate Cancel button in the task modal — close X is the cancel affordance. closeTaskModal handles the re-render side-effects.

label: Add a task... (text input)
expected_behavior: Free-text task title. Cleared on openTaskModal (tasks.js:162). Enter key submits via bound keydown handler -> addTask() (tasks.js:188). Empty/whitespace-only input is rejected by addTask (tasks.js:180).
notes: This is the task 'title' field — there is no separate Save button; Add (or Enter) persists.

label: Due date (optional, date picker)
expected_behavior: type=date. Optional due date passed to _saveTask as dueDate (tasks.js:180,93). Cleared on modal open. Empty allowed (stores ''). Drives overdue/Today/Tomorrow labels in the list (tasks.js:168).
notes: NOTE: prompt anticipated a priority field + notes textarea — neither exists in #taskModal. Only title + due date.

label: + Add
expected_behavior: addTask (tasks.js:180): reads #taskInput + #taskDue; if non-empty text and _taskModalLeadId set, clears input then _saveTask -> addDoc(leads/<id>/tasks {text,done:false,dueDate,createdAt}) and re-renders #taskList. No-op on empty text or missing lead id.
notes: This is the de-facto Save/Create for a task. No edit-in-place; tasks are add/complete/delete only.

label: (per-task checkbox — Complete toggle)
expected_behavior: Dynamically rendered per task by renderTaskList (tasks.js:177). data-tk delegate (tasks.js:214) -> checkTask(taskId, checked) (tasks.js:193): optimistically toggles .done on the row, then _toggleTask -> updateDoc(leads/<id>/tasks/<tid> {done, completedAt}) and re-renders after 400ms. This IS the task 'Complete' control.
source_ref: tasks.js:177 (+ delegate tasks.js:214, checkTask tasks.js:193, _toggleTask tasks.js:99)
notes: No standalone 'Complete' button — completion is the row checkbox. Completed tasks sort to the bottom with .done styling.

label: × (per-task Delete)
expected_behavior: Dynamically rendered per task (tasks.js:177). data-tk delegate -> removeTask(taskId) (tasks.js:194): _deleteTask -> deleteDoc(leads/<id>/tasks/<tid>) then re-renders #taskList. NO confirmation gate — single-click permanent delete of the task.
source_ref: tasks.js:177 (+ delegate tasks.js:214, removeTask tasks.js:194, _deleteTask tasks.js:107)
notes: Deletes a subcollection task doc (not the lead). No confirm dialog — flag as a UX risk for the punchlist (accidental task loss).
